summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Escola Cruzeiro Vila Velha marketing website. All backend APIs pass. UI is loading correctly with most features working. Contact form submission and redirect to /obrigado works end-to-end.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid is 'mobile-sticky-cta' not 'mobile-cta'. The component is visible and working on mobile (shown in screenshot). Minor testid documentation mismatch.
data-testid='thank-you-page' element possibly not found in test timing (quick playwright assertion), but page and back-to-home button visible and functional. No real bug.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge visible in bottom-right corner on all pages - expected for preview env

critical_code_review_comments: CoachesSection uses testid 'coach-card-0' (index-based) instead of named testid like 'coach-lucas' - minor testability issue
TestimonialsSection has useEffect with `next` as dependency but `next` is recreated each render - could cause excessive re-renders. Consider useCallback on `next` or use functional form
server.py: CORS middleware is added after router inclusion - this is technically fine in FastAPI but best practice is to add middleware before router
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_João Silva contact submission via backend test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend: POST/GET /api/contact fully working, all 6 tests pass. Frontend: Hero CTAs, trust section, programs (3 cards), testimonials slider (prev/next/dots), coaches section, contact form submission → /obrigado redirect, /turmas-lotadas page, floating WhatsApp button, mobile hamburger menu all working. Mobile sticky CTA uses testid 'mobile-sticky-cta'. Coach card uses testid 'coach-card-0'. Testimonials nav uses 'testimonial-prev' and 'testimonial-next'.
rca_of_issues: No critical issues found. All core flows are functional.
